Subject: // FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : VEDANTA LTD & BALCO OR NOM // BULK
ALUMINA, 23000 MT (+/-5% CHOPT) // GO DAU - KAKINADA / GANGAVARAM // LAYCAN
: 20 - 25 DEC'25
 
GOOD DAY !
 
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
 
//
Please submit your bids by or before 27th Nov 2025 12 pm IST & your offer
should be valid till 30th Nov 2025 COB , online auction will be conducted on
27rd Nov 2025 3:30 pm IST or will be updated accordingly.
 
Please find below requirement from shipper which is non-negotiable . 100%
checklist compliance is must , Checklist should be signed from Head owners &
Please note if vessel check list and confirmation provided at the time of
vessel nomination are not in accordance with the actual condition and
loading condition agreed after her arrival, shipper will not load the vessel
and they hold owners responsibility for any delay or additional costs
incurred
 
ACCT : Vedanta limited-aluminium & power, Vedanta limited-aluminium &
power(SEZ unit) & BALCO or Nominee.
CARGO :  Smelter Grade Alumina in Bulk. 
QUANTITY : 23000 MT (+/-) 5% CHOPT in bulk
LAYCAN : 20 - 25th Dec 2025 
LOAD PORT : Go Dau, Vietnam ( all Conditions as per Load port terms and
conditions ).
DISCHARGE PORT :  Kakinada / Gangavaram , East Coast of India
LOAD RATE : Go Dau , 4000 MTPD
DISCHARGE RATE : 
Kakinada basis 6000 , 7000 , 8000 , 9000 , 10000 , 11000 , 12000 MTPD
Gangavaram basis 3500 MTPD.
 
NILL ADDCOM + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
 
Age: Not exceeding 15 years.
Demurrage and Despatch as per CP terms.
 
For load port vessel acceptance, charterers intend to have max 48 hrs time
due to different time zones. Also, charterers would prefer vessel arrival at
LP on 1st day of Laycan . Kindly note that LP Terms, Conditions & attached
standard CP are non-negotiable & owners should give acceptance to the same
while quoting Point to be noted that Once the subs lifted, within 24 hours
CP must be signed off .The final CP will be supported with signed off
document and will be part of agreement. 
Any submission after the cut-off time will not be considered and kindly
don't change the subject.
 
//
 
 
KIND REGARDS,
Ms KAVITA JANTWAL
